field_values.action_summary: Dorothy discovers that her house has landed on top of a figure; upon investigation, she realizes she has killed the Wicked Witch of the East, liberating the Munchkins from their oppression.
location_requirements: The site of the house landing
field_values.camera_intent: Low angle shots looking up at house impact; Medium shots for Dorothy and Munchkin interaction; Reveal shot of the Witch under the house structure
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: House position relative to character movement
Scale disparity between Dorothy and munchkins
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the accidental destruction of the Wicked Witch of the East via house landing. The scene must visually communicate the scale difference between Dorothy and the Munchkins while transitioning from the shock of a heavy impact to the communal triumph of a liberated people.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (young human girl, weary traveler appearance)
- toto (dog)
- munchkins (small population)

## Required Environments
- The site of the house landing (lush country, colorful flowers, fruit-bearing trees)

## Continuity Constraints
- Position of the house relative to characters
- Scale difference between Dorothy and the Munchkins

## Beat List
- BT001: Dorothy discovers the house impact
- BT002: Investigation of the figure/Reveal of the Witch
- BT003: Realization and Munchkin celebration
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
